episodes.title: The '69 Camaro Project
episodes.description: The crew takes on a rusted-out '69 Camaro that hasn't run since 1987. Owner wants it back to full show condition in just three weeks.

episodes.title: The Bitchin' Coronet
episodes.description: A Dodge Coronet with a mysterious past arrives at the shop. The team has to track down original parts across three states to make it right.

episodes.title: Twin Mustang Madness
episodes.description: For the first time, two identical Mustangs come in simultaneously. The team splits into rival crews competing to finish first.

episodes.title: The Street Rod Showdown
episodes.description: A 1932 Ford roadster gets a full hot rod treatment ahead of a major show in Las Vegas. The deadline is impossibly tight.

episodes.title: Season 2 Premiere: The Hellcat
episodes.description: A collector brings in a rare Dodge Hellcat with a damaged supercharger. The rebuild could be the biggest job the shop has ever tackled.

episodes.title: Chrome Dreams
episodes.description: A vintage chrome shop teaches the team old-school plating techniques for an immaculate 1957 Chevy Bel Air restoration.

episodes.title: Back to Basics
episodes.description: The shop returns to its roots with a classic muscle car restoration that brings in the crew's families to see the finished product.

extras.title: Behind the Wrench
extras.description: Go inside the fabrication process with uncut shop footage.

extras.title: The Crew
extras.description: Meet the mechanics, fabricators, and designers that make it all happen.

extras.title: Season 9 Trailer
extras.description: The biggest builds yet — a full preview of what's coming this season.
